MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-05-2015 IN 206, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. ROWENA LIZIN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT LA SALLE PRESERVATION LLP. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/20/15 IS CONTINUED TO 2/29/16 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-30-2015 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT LA SALLE PRESERVATION LP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL ON SHORTENED TIME IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY FOR ITS CURRENTLY SET HEARING DATE OF 4/30/15. MOVING PARTY DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1005(B). BUT THE COURT THEREAFTER STATED TO THE PARTIES THAT IT IS CONTINUING THIS HEARING FOR THIS MOTION TO BE HEARD ON MAY-05-2015, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 58262580)
